name: Capital Gains Election for Self-Created Musical Works

eligibility.description: Available to the creator of musical works or those with a carryover basis from the creator who sell or exchange the property.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to treat the sale or exchange of self-created musical compositions or copyrights in musical works as the sale of a capital asset rather than ordinary income.
